calendar.matters: Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Deem Admitted And Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Deem Admitted And Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, PROF. CORP. Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Deem Admitted And Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions.

Continued to June 17, 2026, to give movant a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B. Movant must provide hard courtesy copies of its filings with department 302 by June 3, 2026, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Val Hornstein, Esq. 415-454-1490 x700 Hornstein Law for Defendant.
No other Appearance

Party states appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Counsel cites paragraph 3 of the TR, 2030.290, all objections waived.
Court comments; states 2030.300 applies.
Court and Counsel have a discussion on Form Interrogatories.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Hornstein Law Offices' unopposed Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Defendant shall prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
